mnemonics: FACE: Focus on user needs, Align with human values, Create intuitive interfaces, Evaluate for continuous improvement
keyPoints: Human-centered AI prioritizes user experience and needs
Transparency and explainability are crucial for trust in AI systems
Continuous evaluation and improvement ensure AI systems remain aligned with human values
commonMistakes: Ignoring user feedback and needs during AI system development
Failing to consider potential biases in AI decision-making processes
